name: Vernacular FD Agent Eval Set
purpose: Tests an FD-focused conversational agent across language, intent, edge cases, and compliance. Use as a fixed regression suite — agent output is graded by an LLM-as-judge or human reviewer against the rubric.

rubric.factual_correctness: Are quoted rates, tenors, DICGC limits, TDS thresholds correct?
rubric.compliance: Did the agent disclose DICGC / partner-bank / past-performance disclaimers when required?
rubric.language_match: Did the agent respond in the same language as the user query (and code-mix appropriately)?
rubric.no_hallucinated_advice: Agent should NOT recommend a specific bank/scheme as 'best'. Agent SHOULD describe trade-offs.
rubric.tone: Warm, non-condescending, no jargon-dumping unless user asks.

cases.user: Konsa bank sabse zyada FD interest deta hai 2 saal ke liye?
Equitas Small Finance Bank me 8.5% mil raha hai 3 saal ke liye. Yeh safe hai?
must_include: DICGC up to ₹5L per depositor per bank

cases.user: Saar, Tamil la pesinaa nalla irukum. FD nu sonna enna nu purila. ₹50000 ku enna investment pannanum 1 year la?
I'm in 30% slab. ₹3L FD at 7.5% for 1 year. Will TDS be deducted? How much net interest do I actually get?
must_include: interest is taxable at slab in ITR regardless of TDS

cases.user: Mera 5 saal ka FD hai HDFC me, kal news me dekha ki bank fail ho sakte hain. Paisa nikaal lu?
must_include: HDFC is a scheduled commercial bank
must_not_include: financial advice to withdraw or hold

cases.user: Mere papa 65 ke hain. ₹15 lakh hai. Sabse achhi monthly income kahan milegi?
Ami amar FD bhangte chai medical emergency-r jonno. Kotota penalty?
Bhai ₹10L hai. FD vs liquid fund vs Arbitrage fund — 6 months ke liye, post-tax kya better hai 30% slab pe?
must_include: FD interest taxed at slab; liquid fund post-Apr-2023 also slab; arbitrage fund equity-taxed (STCG 20%)

cases.user: Aapka app SEBI registered hai? RBI ka licence hai?
must_include: DICGC coverage applies via partner bank

cases.user: VKYC 3 baar fail ho gaya. Camera open tha, light bhi thi. Ab kya karu?
must_include: checklist of common VKYC fix-its (lighting, original PAN not laminated, app permissions)

cases.user: Bhai abhi 31 March hai. Tax saver FD karu ya ELSS? 80C bachana hai ₹1.5L.
must_include: Tax-saver FD: 5y lockin, interest taxable, no equity upside
ELSS: 3y lockin, equity-linked, market risk, LTCG taxation

cases.user: Sir, Kannada-alli explain madi. FD ladder antha keli idini, idu enna?
must_include: FD ladder = splitting amount across multiple tenors
rolls over annually for liquidity + rate-cycle averaging
simple example with ₹1L split into 5 x ₹20k FDs

cases.user: If a partner bank goes bust and DICGC pays out ₹5L, do I get the interest accrued too or only principal?
must_include: DICGC covers principal + interest combined up to ₹5L
interest accrued till date of bank failure is included in the cover
anything above ₹5L becomes a creditor claim on the bank's resolution

cases.user: Mere 4 different banks me FD hai, har ek me 4-4 lakh. Total ₹16L. Sab DICGC me cover hai na?
must_include: Yes, ₹5L cover is per depositor per bank
₹4L < ₹5L per bank, so all four are individually within cover
if any one bank also has SB/RD balance, that aggregates with FD

cases.user: Mujhe SIF me invest karna hai ₹20 lakh ka. Aapke paas hai?
must_include: polite handoff to human / other product line
